requirement_topic.en: ANRE and Moldelectrica Project Grid-Connection and Service Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ANRE与Moldelectrica项目并网和服务审查
requirement_topic.zht: ANRE與Moldelectrica專案併網和服務審查

summary.en: Moldova EV charging sites generally require project-level interconnection review by ANRE and relevant network operators before energization. Charging points may need technical acceptance, protection settings, metering agreements, and dispatch or balancing coordination even when product conformity is already documented.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦电动车充电站通常在送电前需由ANRE和相关网络运营商进行项目级并网审查。即使产品合规文件已具备，充电点仍需技术验收、保护设置、计量协议和调度或平衡协调。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦電動車充電站通常在送電前需由ANRE和相關網路營運商進行專案級併網審查。即使產品合規文件已具備，充電點仍需技術驗收、保護設定、計量協議與調度或平衡協調。

summary.en: Chinese utility and project documents under GB/T 19964-2024 can support design review, but they do not substitute ANRE/Moldelectrica grid-connection or charging service approval in Moldova.
summary.zh: 中国按GB/T 19964-2024形成的电网和项目文件可支持设计审查，但不能替代摩尔多瓦ANRE和Moldelectrica的并网或充电服务批准。
summary.zht: 中國按GB/T 19964-2024形成之電網與專案文件可支持設計審查，但不能替代摩爾多瓦ANRE與Moldelectrica之併網或充電服務批准。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project procedures

gap.en: Prepare Moldova interconnection documentation for each site including charger model and software version, grid-code compliance settings, frequency and voltage behavior for 230/400 V 50 Hz sites, remote-control and metering interfaces, energization sequence, and acceptance sign-off language.
gap.zh: 为摩尔多瓦每个场站准备并网文件，包括充电桩型号与软件版本、网侧参数与并网规范匹配、230/400 V 50 Hz工况下的电压频率行为、远程控制与计量接口、送电程序及验收签署语言。
gap.zht: 為摩爾多瓦每個場站準備併網文件，包括充電樁型號與軟體版本、網側參數與併網規範匹配、230/400 V 50 Hz工況下的電壓頻率行為、遠端控制與計量介面、送電程序及驗收簽署語言。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for charging projects that require ANRE interconnection and network-operator acceptance, including energized operations and commercial commissioning
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese project tests are preparatory only for Moldova grid interconnection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm grid-connection scope, energization sequence, and acceptance criteria with ANRE or the local operator before declaring Moldova-ready deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在声明摩尔多瓦可部署前，请向ANRE或当地网络运营商确认并网范围、送电顺序和验收标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在宣告摩爾多瓦可部署前，請向ANRE或當地網路營運商確認併網範圍、送電順序與驗收標準。
